input_text: Guidance for safe transportation of blood components
NL_requirements: The system must continuously monitor environmental conditions during the transport process.
If the temperature exceeds 10°C, the system must issue an alert.
If the temperature falls below 1°C, the system must issue an alert.
The transport of red cell components must be completed within 24 hours (86400 seconds).
A single interruption of platelet agitation must not exceed 8 hours (28800 seconds).
A risk assessment must be performed before the transport process begins.
The system must verify the transportation conditions upon receipt of the blood components.
The courier must execute the transport of the blood components.
The system sends the temperatureLog upon completion of the transport.
If the monitoring of environmental conditions fails, the system must initiate emergency cooling.
